# Dhaga

> Dhaga (धागा — "thread") is an open-source, privacy-first, AI-native personal CRM. Capture contacts anywhere (business-card/badge scan, voice notes, web quick-add, browser extension), turn every note into a private knowledge graph, and query it in natural language.

## About

Dhaga is open-core: the entire CRM is licensed AGPL and runs fully self-hosted,
with a source-available proprietary cloud tier layered on top. It is built on
Next.js (App Router) + TypeScript, Postgres + pgvector for storage, and Claude
(via the Anthropic SDK) for extraction, search, and drafting — with a
provider-agnostic gateway so you can bring your own key or a local model. Every
AI-derived fact keeps a receipt back to its source note, and deleting a note
cascades to the facts and graph edges derived from it. Your contact data is your
data about third parties; export always works and nothing is collected silently.

## Docs

- [Documentation home](https://www.dhaga.app/docs)
- [Using Dhaga (end-user guide)](https://www.dhaga.app/docs/guide)
- [Self-hosting](https://www.dhaga.app/docs/self-hosting)
- [Extending Dhaga (LLM/search gateways, BYO-key)](https://www.dhaga.app/docs/extending)
- [API reference](https://www.dhaga.app/docs/api)
- [Contributing](https://www.dhaga.app/docs/contributing)
